sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79919" key="pasipo/rnh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πᾱσῐπόρνη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n79919.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">common prostitute</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0252.tlg001:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hermipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10</biblScope> </bibl> (nisi scrib. divisim).</sense> </entryFree>
